note: Explorer UNIQUE MINERS panel: ~20x speedup + sessionStorage cache + fractional hashrate display. Was: two sequential await loops over 288 blocks each (1,152 RPC roundtrips total, ~5 min open time). Now: ONE parallel batched scan (Promise.all in batches of 30 simultaneous RPC calls), single pass. Re-opening the panel within the same tip-height is now instant via sessionStorage cache. Per-miner hashrate display no longer collapses values < 1 h/s to 0 (8 of 10 miners were showing ~0 h/s purely by Math.round; now shows 2 decimals for sub-1, 1 decimal for sub-10, integer for sub-1000, K-suffix above). Block timestamp is now captured into blockList[i].t so avgBtMiner is the real measured average instead of the 600s default. Meta tag + JSON v key bumped in lockstep per the auto-reload-loop fix procedure.
